title: MANGA Thanx To the Manga
wikitext:
[]: Thanx To the Manga. Post by Saya Nagisa » Sat Nov 24, 2007 10:00 pm One Day I was Given $10 From My Brother. I Already Knew What To Buy. My social Studies teach Loved Anime Especialy Evangelion. So I was into Eva fully this time. He recomended the manga to me. anyways the $$ was gived to me on saturday and my dad promised me he was gonna take me to the mall tomorrow. After i left the library for inernet use and borrowing manga I bought vol. ten...and it had kaoru in It!!!! Anyways I like the manga and at the end of the vol. it talked about this site. Thanx to the manga, i found a great site!!!

[]: Post by The Imperialist » Sun Nov 25, 2007 6:02 am Good. Be a zealot for the cause...

[]: Post by Saya Nagisa » Sun Nov 25, 2007 1:11 pm A What?

[]: Post by The Imperialist » Sun Nov 25, 2007 2:16 pm Pronunciation (US) IPA: /ziːl/ (US) SAMPA: /zi:jəl/ Audio (US)help, file Rhymes: -iːl Etymology From Latin zelus, from Greek ζέλος (zelos) Noun Singular zeal Plural zeal (uncountable) The fervor or tireless devotion for a person, cause, or ideal and determination in its furtherance; diligent enthusiasm; powerful interest. [b]Zealot/[b] zealot (plural zealots) Pronunciation IPA: /ˈzɛlət/ (plural /ˈzɛləts/) 1. one who is zealous, one who is full of zeal for his own specific beliefs or objectives, usually in the negative sense of being too passionate; a fanatic 2. a member of the Zealot movement

[]: Post by Ornette » Sun Nov 25, 2007 2:34 pm clearly, both of you are misunderstanding the other. But as you'll see with most of Imperialist's posts: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Non_sequitur_%28humor%29

[]: Post by The Imperialist » Sun Nov 25, 2007 2:45 pm I’m not trying to be funny or anything. What is the misunderstanding anyway?

[]: Post by Ornette » Sun Nov 25, 2007 4:15 pm You post a non-sequitur, Saya Nagisa doesn't wtf you're talking about, you mistook it as not knowing what a "zealot" was, etc... At anyrate, welcome to the forums, you should drop a post in the Official Welcome Thread over in the Off-Topic subforum.

Article: MANGA Thanx To the Manga
[]: Thanx To the Manga. Post by Saya Nagisa » Sat Nov 24, 2007 10:00 pm One Day I was Given $10 From My Brother. I Already Knew What To Buy. My social Studies teach Loved Anime Especialy Evangelion. So I was into Eva fully this time. He recomended the manga to me. anyways the $$ was gived to me on saturday and my dad promised me he was gonna take me to the mall tomorrow. After i left the library for inernet use and borrowing manga I bought vol. ten...and it had kaoru in It!!!! Anyways I like the manga and at the end of the vol. it talked about this site. Thanx to the manga, i found a great site!!!

[b]Zealot/[b] zealot (plural zealots) Pronunciation IPA: /ˈzɛlət/ (plural /ˈzɛləts/) 1. one who is zealous, one who is full of zeal for his own specific beliefs or objectives, usually in the negative sense of being too passionate; a fanatic 2. a member of the Zealot movement
